title: Launch
changes: Family circles with invitation-based membership and optional admin approval
Events with RSVPs, sleeping arrangements, meals, carpool coordination, and weather forecasts
Saved locations with sleeping room templates that auto-fill new events
Photo albums with tagging and AI-suggested captions
Greeting cards — sign together, send on a date, with AI message drafting
Polls with AI-generated question and option suggestions
Family tree with profiles, relationships, and milestones
Weekly digest emails with AI-narrated summaries
